column1:
INSTRUCTIONS: (double-click)
The NET kgCO2e EMISSIONS column (Col. I) shows the global warming potential (GWP) of each material based on the information provided. 
You must specify the R-VALUE, THICKNESS, FRAMING SPACING or any other required information in areas highlighted in YELLOW.
Enter "1" in the SELECT column (Col. H) to add each material to your building. The net carbon emissions for the selected material will be highlighted in ORANGE. 
Use the percentage values cell (Col. G) if necessary to adjust the material quantity present in the building. 
The carbon footprint of each selection will be added to the section SUBTOTAL (top of Col. M)  for this page, and for summary reporting.
